title: Four-Location Panchang Computation Readiness Bridge
classification: Path B — engine/banks exist but only as internal dry-run / one-location public-blocked records

approved_next_step.title: Four-Location Internal Panchang Computation Harness
scope: Generate internal-only computed records for the pilot date range.
Carry canonical location_id, latitude, longitude and timezone.
Apply existing AG70K/AG70L-style internal dry-run model only if source code/function is discoverable.
If no reusable function is found, create harness contract and block computation.
